question: Can a fixed three-vote slow BTC trend overlay beat raw 1x buy-and-hold after realistic costs in every ex-post historical bull trough-to-peak leg, while reducing bear-cycle losses, without future information in its decisions?
decision_use: Determine whether this low-complexity BTC macro-cycle mechanism deserves continued candidate research; Demo and product effects remain excluded.
strongest_claim_if_all_gates_pass: Supports within the three observed historical cycles and Binance funding bridge only; does not prove that the current bear has ended or that the next bull cycle will be profitable.
known_exposure: BTC price history through 2026H1, several Donchian and momentum variants, and a paper-scale 25% volatility/2x Donchian diagnostic have already been viewed in other studies. The exact three-vote mapping, raw 1x bull-leg objective, fixed cycle windows and outputs have not been run. This is a rule-level sequential test, not untouched market data.

binance_bridge.contents: official 1d perpetual bars, 8h mark-price bars and actual funding history; only opened after development authorization

fixed_rule.action_time: next daily observation; Binance bridge uses next UTC daily open

fixed_diagnostics_not_eligible_for_selec: same three-vote score scaled to maximum 1.0x

binance_bridge.funding: all actual events from the frozen source manifest

development_gate: both development bull legs beat 1x buy-and-hold in base and stress
full development base and stress beat buy-and-hold
development base maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
the complete 2017-peak to 2018-bottom bear leg beats buy-and-hold
both bull-entry lags to at least 1x are at most 180 days
the first peak-exit lag to at most 0.5x is at most 120 days
not strictly dominated by binary SMA200 at the same 1.5x cap
180-day block-bootstrap probability of beating buy-and-hold is at least 0.80
confirmation_gate: 2022-2025 bull leg beats buy-and-hold in base and stress
full confirmation period beats buy-and-hold in base
confirmation maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
observed post-2025-peak bear segment beats buy-and-hold
Binance actual-funding bridge beats the spot buy-and-hold proxy in base and stress for the 2022-2025 bull leg
stop_rule: Any development failure keeps confirmation and Binance bridge unopened. Diagnostics cannot be promoted to a replacement candidate from this study.
allowed_fixes: Only data integrity, parsing, timestamp, deterministic calculation, serialization or documentation fixes that do not change the rule, periods, cycle windows, costs, gates, trial counts or bootstrap settings; record before rerun.
